title: start_handles try_lock may silently drop handles (mooted by F-QC2-04 fix)
closure_note: Superseded by F-QC2-04 fix (commit 2466a72): tokio::sync::Mutex changed to std::sync::Mutex + lock().expect(). try_lock() no longer exists in codebase. Verified by grep.

title: Mutex try_lock contention loses handles (same root as R-M1-W01)
closure_note: Superseded by same fix as R-M1-W01 (F-QC2-04, commit 2466a72). std::sync::Mutex with lock().expect() eliminates try_lock contention issue.
